deliverables: DGCLegend uses `COLORS`/inline styles for explorer-body semantic colors instead of Tailwind color utilities.
Residue focus color is bridged through a CSS variable instead of an unannotated hardcoded outline color.
Tests/static grep verify no drift-prone Tailwind color utilities remain in DGCLegend.
testable_behaviors: DGC legend loaded/error/mutant states render with the canonical explorer color tokens.
scope_boundaries: Do not refactor the entire design system.
Do not import `COLORS` into Arcivus chrome components under `src/components/layout` or `src/components/ui/Logo.tsx`/`SocialLinks.tsx`.
